title: Meet Our Team
subtitle: The passionate minds behind Chakrawal Digital

members.name: Choeng Rayu
members.bio: Visionary leader with a deep understanding of Cambodia's digital landscape. Drives strategic partnerships and ensures every project aligns with our mission to empower local businesses.

members.name: Yen Mara
members.bio: Creative marketer who bridges the gap between technology and people. Crafts compelling brand stories and growth strategies that resonate with Cambodian audiences.

members.name: Rithi Reach
members.bio: Full-stack architect passionate about clean code and scalable systems. Leads technical decisions and mentors the team on modern development practices.

members.name: Tep Somnang
members.bio: Operations expert who keeps projects on time and within budget. Streamlines workflows and ensures smooth delivery from discovery to deployment.

members.name: Povpanha Ngovseng
members.bio: Financial strategist ensuring sustainable growth. Manages resources wisely so we can invest in talent and deliver exceptional value to our partners.

members.name: Prak Dararith
members.bio: Detail-oriented coordinator who translates client needs into actionable tasks. Ensures every sprint delivers measurable progress and client satisfaction.
